channel.title: Meeting on DAV 84
channel.description: Recent content in Meeting on DAV 84

item.title: June 2026 Meeting Cancellation Notice
item.author: contact@dav84.us
item.description:
We would like to inform all members that the June meeting is cancelled.

This cancellation applies only to the June meeting and does not affect any other scheduled gatherings.

July Meeting Confirmation

Our July meeting will proceed as previously scheduled at the same location and the same time as previously communicated. Our meeting location will remain a the Crestwood Elks Lodge on the first Friday of the month at 6:30pm. There are no changes to the July meeting venue, date, or start time.
